ability.name: Unyielding Justice
ability.description: Whenever you take damage, draw 1 card.

ability.name: Bloodlust
ability.description: Discard 1 card to increase your Attack Range by 1 for this turn.

ability.name: Shadow Step
ability.description: When targeted by an attack, you may discard a card of the same suit to dodge it.

ability.name: Immovable Root
ability.description: You cannot be forced to discard cards by opponent card effects.

ability.name: Ashes to Ashes
ability.description: When your health reaches 0 for the first time, discard your entire hand to restore 2 Health. (Once per game)

ability.name: Toxic Coating
ability.description: During your turn, you may discard a Club card to give your next Attack 'Poison' (target takes 1 damage at the start of their next turn).

ability.name: Art of War
ability.description: When an opponent plays a Tactical card, you may discard two cards of the same suit to cancel its effect.

ability.name: Feral Roar
ability.description: Once per turn, discard a Heart card to force all opponents within Range 1 to discard a card.

ability.name: Thunder Strike
ability.description: Discard a Spade card to deal 1 damage to any opponent, ignoring distance.

ability.name: Shifting Sands
ability.description: When targeted by an effect, discard a Diamond card to redirect it to another valid target in range.
